hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'ts/wasm/'; then echo 'BLOCK: ts/wasm/ files are generated by wasm-pack. Edit Rust source instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.rs'; then cd /home/edoardocicognani/Code/HyperionEngine && cargo clippy -p hyperion-core --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":\s*")[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '\.ts$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '\.test\.ts$'; then TEST="${FILE%.ts}.test.ts"; if [ -f "$TEST" ]; then cd /home/edoardocicognani/Code/HyperionEngine/ts && npx vitest run "$TEST" --reporter=dot 2>&1 | tail -3; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":\s*")[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '\.wgsl$'; then echo 'WARNING: WGSL shader modified. Verify bind group layouts match across cull.wgsl, scatter.wgsl, forward-pass.ts, and renderer.ts'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":\s*")[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '(ring_buffer\.rs|ring-buffer\.ts|lib\.rs|worker-bridge\.ts|engine-worker\.ts)'; then echo 'REMINDER: Cross-language protocol file modified. Run protocol-sync-checker agent before committing.'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":\s*")[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '(physics\.rs|physics_commands\.rs)'; then echo 'REMINDER: Physics file modified. Test with: cargo test -p hyperion-core --features physics-2d'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":\s*")[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qP '(lib\.rs|index\.ts|components\.rs)$'; then echo 'REMINDER: Structural file modified. Update CLAUDE.md architecture tables and MEMORY.md if needed.'; fi
